_comment: Stryker mutates ONLY the money/security/resilience-critical files. Mutating everything would take hours; this scope completes in <8min on CI. Add entries when a new critical lib lands — AND add a fast test file that kills its mutants to the command below, or the score silently dilutes. THRESHOLD RATCHET (2026-06-11): break sits ~4-5 points under the measured score and must only move UP. Measured 58.49% after plan-gate/business-memory/webhook-events killing tests landed (was 34.35% with planGate/businessMemory/webhookEvents at ~0%) → break 54. Next-weakest targets if raising further: serviceTimeouts (21.6%), idempotency (34.3%), planLimits (35.6%). Keep command tests fast — each runs once per mutant.

commandRunner.command: node --test tests/oauth-crypto.test.js tests/budget-counter.test.js tests/abuse-detector.test.js tests/stripe-webhook.test.js tests/circuit-breaker.test.js tests/retry-with-jitter.test.js tests/external-http.test.js tests/idempotency.test.js tests/event-schemas.test.js tests/plan-limits.test.js tests/cost-guard.test.js tests/plan-gate.test.js tests/business-memory.test.js tests/webhook-events.test.js
